title: Boom!
description: Boom! Adds new explosives to the game
body:
Boom! currently adds 3 new Explosives

**-Landmines** are new blocks that will explode when stept on, right-clicked, destroyed by explosion, hit by projectile. Placing a landmine will also give you the advancement **watch your steps**.

**-Trigger Pipe Bombs** are new items that when right-clicked will explode but not destroy blocks.

**-Instant Pipe Bombs** are the same as Trigger Pipe Bombs but will instantly explode when in your hand.

Boom! also adds a new Advancement for placing TNT for the first time.
